title: デビュー戦の後に・ディスカッション

text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide has asked me to review race
footage together, so after returning to the school
I head over to meet her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... My positioning is a little sloppy. I have a
bad habit of just staring straight ahead during
races.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Let's watch again from the beginning. I'm sure
we'll find other issues too.

Since she's just finished her first race and concert
performance, I figure she must be pretty tired.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You needn't worry about me. Now that I've
experienced a real race, I'm discovering a lot of
issues I never noticed before.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
And we need to fix them. The winning equation I
so desire to complete is the very thing I'll be using
against her, after all.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
choice_data_list:
(Right... The winning equation against Narita
Brian.)

text_block_list.text:
It seems she's realized how exceedingly difficult it
will be to perfect her equation.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Acceleration... wind resistance... the angle at
which my feet hit the ground...

Maybe my role as her trainer should be to provide
practical experience that will allow her to
develop her calculations.
choice_data_list: Do you want to enter the Asahi Hai F.S.?
Do you want to enter the Asahi Hai F.S.?

text_block_list.text:
The Asahi Hai Futurity Stakes is a G1 race
between the top junior racers.

The competition is fierce, but it might be a good
experience for her.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: And a good one, at that. I'll do it.

Her glasses glint in the light as we lock in our next
course of action.
